name: Apricot-Glazed Cornish Hens
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons white wine or chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a medium bowl, stir together bread cubes, celery, onion, salt, pepper, and marjoram.
3. In a small saucepan, melt apricot preserves, margarine, and white wine or chicken broth until combined.
4. Stuff each cornish game hen with the stuffing mix, securing the opening with a toothpick. Tuck under the wings of the hens.
5. Place the hens, breast side up, in a roasting pan.
6. Bake for 1 hour.
7. Meanwhile, melt apricot preserves, margarine, and marjoram leaves together in a pan over medium heat until melted, about 2-3 minutes.
8. Brush each hen with half of the glaze sauce after 1 hour of baking.
9. Continue brushing the hens with the remaining glaze every 15 to 20 minutes.
10. Finish baking the hens for an additional 40 to 50 minutes, or until they are fork tender. If the hens are browning too quickly, loosely cover them with foil.
